description_long: This is a vintage-style record player with a rectangular wooden base and a clear, hinged dust cover that is currently open. The front panel features an array of control knobs, switches, and dials, as well as a cassette deck and a radio tuner, suggesting multifunctional audio capabilities. The turntable platter is black and circular, with a vinyl record placed on top, and a tonearm positioned to the right side. The wood grain finish gives the device a classic, retro appearance, while the metallic and plastic components add functional detail. The back and sides are mostly plain wood, with some visible ports and connectors for audio input and output. The overall design is robust and boxy, typical of mid-to-late 20th-century home audio equipment.
description: A vintage wooden record player with a clear open dust cover, front control panel, and a visible turntable platter with a vinyl record. Features include multiple knobs, a cassette deck, and a radio tuner.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, cassette deck, radio tuner, and the turntable platter with a vinyl record under an open dust cover.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the wooden base and the open dust cover, with the turntable platter partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel, mostly plain wood with some ports and connectors, and the dust cover open.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the wooden base, the open dust cover, and the turntable platter.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and black, occupying a prominent position on the top surface. It appears to be made of plastic or metal with a matte finish, and a vinyl record is placed on it. The platter is smooth with subtle grooves and no visible markings or logos.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, positioned to the right of the platter, and appears to be medium-length with a straight shape. It is likely made of metal or plastic, with a dark finish, and is resting over the platter, ready for playback.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its presence is implied at the end of the tonearm, likely small and metallic or plastic, attached as a separate component.
attribute_control_knobs: Multiple control knobs and buttons are visible on the front panel, including round and rectangular shapes, mostly black or silver in color. They are arranged in rows, with some labeled for volume, tuning, and function selection. There are also switches and sliders, all made of plastic or metal.
attribute_dust_cover: A dust cover is present, made of clear plastic with a slightly frosted appearance. It is hinged at the back and currently open, covering the top of the record player when closed. The cover is rectangular and fits snugly over the device, with visible hinges but no handles.
